title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Grofers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Grofers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
